groups.title: Research Groups
groups.subtitle: Organize members into research groups and appoint leaders.
groups.adminOnly: You need administrator access to manage groups.
groups.empty: No groups yet. Create one to organize your lab.
groups.leaderNotInTenant: That user is not in this lab.
groups.confirmDelete: Delete this group? Members are not deleted.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your lab dashboard
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create an account to access the lab platform
auth.signInToManage: Sign in to manage your account

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Ask anything about your lab
ai.placeholder: Type your question... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
ai.emptyHistory: No conversations yet. Ask anything about your lab or literature.
ai.paperSelectorEmpty: No papers yet — upload from Papers
ai.paperSelectorScopeHint: Papers selected to scope the search (max 10). 0 = search the whole library.
ai.paperSelectorStartConversation: Send a message to start scoping papers

audit.title: Audit
audit.error: We couldn't run the audit. Please try again in a moment.

ai.errorBusy: Labyra is handling a lot of requests right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
ai.errorTimeout: This took too long. Try selecting fewer papers or breaking up your question.
ai.errorGeneric: Something interrupted the system. Please try again.

papers.uploadPageSubtitle: Upload a research paper PDF to add it to your lab's searchable library.
papers.dragOrClick: Drag a PDF here, or click to browse
papers.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload this file. Please check the format and try again.
papers.duplicateDetected: This paper already exists in your library.
papers.listPageSubtitle: Research papers in your lab's knowledge base.
papers.uploadToStart: Upload a PDF to start building your lab's knowledge base.
papers.nPages: {count, plural, =0 {0 pages} one {1 page} other {# pages}}
papers.nChunks: {count, plural, =0 {0 chunks} one {1 chunk} other {# chunks}}
papers.title: Papers
papers.subtitle: Research papers in your lab's knowledge base
papers.citationsOutTitle: {count, plural, =0 {No outbound citations} one {1 outbound citation} other {# outbound citations}}
papers.citationsInTitle: {count, plural, =0 {No inbound citations} one {1 inbound citation} other {# inbound citations}}
papers.confidenceDoiExactTip: Matched to a registered DOI in Crossref or OpenAlex — title, authors, and journal are verified.
papers.confidenceManualTip: Metadata was entered or corrected manually.
papers.confidenceTitleFuzzyTip: Matched by title similarity; the DOI couldn't be confirmed, so some details may be approximate.
papers.confidenceUnverifiedTip: No matching record was found in Crossref or OpenAlex, so this reference couldn't be verified against a registered source. The details shown are extracted directly from the source PDF.
papers.filterInLibraryHint: Show only citations resolved to papers in your lab's library
papers.domainFilterNoMatches: No papers match the selected filters
papers.archiveConfirm: Archive this paper? It will be hidden from the list. You can restore it later.
papers.paperCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 papers} one {1 paper} other {# papers}}
papers.filterShowMoreN: Show {count, plural, one {# more} other {# more}}
papers.highlightsEmptyHint: Turn on Highlight, then select text in the PDF to mark it.
papers.translationsEmptyHint: Turn on Translate, then Ctrl+drag a region in the PDF.
papers.partialNote: Continues adjacent text (selection was cut mid-sentence)
papers.sameLanguage: Already in the target language — shown unchanged
papers.metadataConfirmDesc: Edit or fill in the title, authors, year, and DOI. You can auto-fill from a DOI.
papers.metadataDoiInvalidSave: Leave blank or enter a valid 10.xxxx/yyyy
papers.metadataDoiDuplicate: DOI already belongs to another paper
papers.shareForbidden: Only the uploader or an admin can share this paper
papers.metadataFetchHint: Look up Crossref → OpenAlex and fill in the canonical title/authors/year.
papers.metadataAuthorsPlaceholder:
One author per line
Jane Doe
John Smith
papers.noDoiForPaper: No DOI on record for this paper.
papers.openDoiNewTab: Open DOI in a new tab
papers.doiUnverifiedHint: This DOI didn't resolve at Crossref or OpenAlex — it may be wrong (e.g. an OCR error). Please double-check.
papers.archiveSelectedConfirm: Archive {count} selected paper(s)? You can restore them later.

collections.title: Collections
collections.deleteDescription: Subcollections move up one level. Papers are never deleted — those in a deleted subcollection move to an "Unfiled" group under its parent.
collections.duplicateName: A collection with that name already exists here.
collections.createFromFilterDesc: These {count} filtered papers will be added to a new collection. Papers matching the filter later are not added automatically.

materials.subtitle: Manage lab materials inventory

form.name: Name

form.name: Name

form.noExperiments: No experiments yet. Create one first.

composition.title: Target composition (multi-phase)
composition.description: Declare the intended composition for deviation analysis. Leave empty for single-phase samples.
composition.emptyHint: No components declared. Click "Add component" if this sample is a composite (e.g. MoS2/rGO).

experiments.title: Experiments
experiments.subtitle: Manage lab experiments
experiments.empty: No experiments yet. Add your first experiment to start.

equipment.deleteConfirmHint: Permanently delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
equipment.bulkDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete {count} item(s)? This cannot be undone.

form.noSlotFound: No free slot found that day

err.too_far_ahead: Can't book more than 14 days ahead.

bookings.timelineReadonly: View only. Admins can drag to reschedule.

bookings.tooFarAhead: Can't book more than 14 days ahead.

spectra.title: Measurements
spectra.subtitle: Manage measurements for experiments
spectra.empty: No measurements yet. Upload a spectrum to start.
spectra.dropHere: Drop file here or click to select
spectra.selectTypeFirst: Please select a spectrum type first

detail.analysisPending: Spectrum uploaded. AI analysis will trigger when worker is available (Phase 2).

spectra.dragOrClickMulti: Drag files here or click to select (multiple)
spectra.multiFileHint: Multiple files supported. Each file gets its own spectrum type.
spectra.selectTypeForAll: Select spectrum type for all files
spectra.deleteConfirm: Delete this measurement? You can undo.

demo.menuLabel: Pick an XRD sample to try
demo.hint: No data yet? Try a prepared XRD sample.

spectra.uploadFromSampleHint: Measurements are uploaded from each sample. This list shows all measurements linked to this experiment.

referenceCards.title: Reference card library
referenceCards.subtitle: Internal reference card library — added from XRD spectrum detail pages (R161 4a-pdf).
referenceCards.emptyHint: Open an XRD spectrum detail page → 'Add reference card' to paste ICDD/JCPDS data.
referenceCards.peakListSubtitle: {count, plural, one {# peak} other {# peaks}} from this reference card
referenceCards.deleteConfirm: Delete this reference card? This cannot be undone.
referenceCards.editHint: Update metadata. Peak list is immutable — re-paste to create a new card.

lifecycle.deprecateConfirmDesc: The record will be hidden from default lists but retained and reversible.
lifecycle.retractConfirmDesc: Retraction marks the record as scientifically invalid. This action CANNOT be undone. Please provide a reason for the audit log.
lifecycle.cannotReactivateRetracted: Cannot reactivate retracted records (immutable per compliance policy).
lifecycle.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

explorer.pageDescription: Select an entity to view its PROV-O lineage graph with related entities
explorer.emptyState: No entities of this type yet. Create your first Material/Sample/Experiment to see lineage.

panel.title: Deviation analysis
panel.emptyState: No deviation analysis available. The sample may not have a declared formula or composition, or the analysis has not run yet.

multiPhase.title: Multi-phase analysis
multiPhase.intendedNotObservedHelp: declared in sample composition but signatures were not detected.
multiPhase.unexpectedPeaks: Peaks not explained by declared phases
multiPhase.compositeHelp: Cross-phase phenomena (charge transfer, heterojunction, interface modes, ...)

rietveld.title: Rietveld refinement
rietveld.profileTitle: Caglioti profile (FWHM² = U·tan²θ + V·tanθ + W) + Pseudo-Voigt

csie.title: Cross-spectrum analysis
csie.insufficientData: Need ≥2 analyzed spectra with declared composition to run cross-spectrum inference.

chemicals.empty: No chemicals yet. Add your first chemical to start tracking inventory.

form.name: Name
form.casNotFound: CAS not found in PubChem — enter details manually.

aiPreferences.title: AI Preferences
aiPreferences.subtitle: Personalize how the AI assistant responds to you. These apply across all your labs.
aiPreferences.enableMemoryDesc: Let the assistant remember facts about your research across conversations. Off by default; you can turn this off anytime.

labContext.title: Lab Context
labContext.subtitle: Shared context the AI uses for everyone in this lab. Admin only.
labContext.glossaryDesc: One per line, format: term: definition
labContext.houseStyleDesc: Free-text instructions appended to the AI system prompt.
labContext.defaultLanguageDesc: Papers are pre-translated into this language. Set it to your lab's reading language.

memory.title: Remembered facts
memory.subtitle: What the assistant has learned about you. Delete anything you don't want kept.
memory.empty: Nothing remembered yet. Enable memory above and chat to let the assistant learn.

manuscript.title: Manuscripts
manuscript.subtitle: Draft grounded manuscripts from your lab's data and papers
manuscript.needCollection: Create a collection first — it is the manuscript's source.
manuscript.selectOrCreate: Select a manuscript, or create one.
manuscript.templateLabReport: Lab-report layout — Intro · Materials · Methods · Results & Discussion · Conclusion (no abstract).
manuscript.deleteConfirm: {title} and its drafts will be permanently deleted.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Research projects (topics) — group experiments, computations and manuscripts toward one goal.
projects.formHint: A project is the goal (thesis, grant); it links work but doesn't own shared resources.
projects.emptyHint: Create a project to group experiments, computations and manuscripts.
projects.name: Name
projects.namePlaceholder: e.g. PhD thesis on WO₃ photoanodes
projects.notFoundHint: It may have been deleted, or you may not have access.

protocolTemplates.title: Protocol Templates
protocolTemplates.subtitle: Reusable node-graph procedures you can attach to experiments.
protocolTemplates.formHint: Name your template — build the steps in the editor.
protocolTemplates.name: Name
protocolTemplates.emptyHint: Create a reusable procedure you can attach to experiments.
protocolTemplates.notFoundHint: It may have been archived or removed.
protocolTemplates.stepCount: {count, plural, =0 {no steps} one {# step} other {# steps}}
protocolTemplates.emptyGraphHint: The graph editor is coming soon.
protocolTemplates.editorHint: Drag from a node's right edge to connect. Click a node to edit it; use the trash icon to delete.

computation.description: DFT / MD / ML-potential computation jobs and their results.
computation.submitSoon: Submitting from the UI is coming soon — workflows are currently launched via the compute API.
computation.submitWorkflowIdHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens — must be unique.
computation.submitOk: Submitted {id} — it will appear under Workflows shortly.
computation.submitError: Submission failed. Check the run ID is unique and try again.
computation.builderHint: Drag handle to handle to connect · select a node and press Delete to remove · scroll to zoom.
computation.checkEcutRatioLow: ecutrho/ecutwfc = {ratio} is low for these pseudopotentials (need ≥ {min}); raise ecutrho.
computation.checkEcutwfcLow: ecutwfc = {v} Ry looks low — most PAW sets need ≥ 40–50 Ry.
computation.checkHubbardElemMissing: Hubbard manifold references an element absent from the structure: {manifolds}
computation.checkHubbardMissingOxide: Transition-metal oxide with no Hubbard U — consider DFT+U.
computation.check2dVdwMissing: 2D cell without vdW dispersion on: {units} — add D3.
computation.check2dVdwOk: vdW dispersion set on all 2D units
computation.checkVdwInconsistent: vdW set on some but not all SCF-type units (missing: {units})
computation.checkKspacingCoarse: k-point spacing coarse (~{sab}, {sc} Å⁻¹) — consider a denser grid.
computation.checkSmearingNoDegauss: Unit {unit} uses smearing but degauss is 0.
computation.resultsEmpty: No completed results yet for this workflow.
computation.bandsNoUnit: This workflow has no bands calculation yet.
computation.bandsZoomHint: drag to pan · scroll to zoom
computation.computePlaceholder: Backend configuration and launch — coming next.
computation.computeBackendNote: Runs on Google Cloud Batch (Spot). Launch re-runs this workflow's definition under a new run ID.
computation.computeLaunchError: Launch failed — check worker config and that the run ID is unique.
computation.newDescription: Launch a DFT run by cloning an existing workflow or importing a definition.
computation.newNoBase: No existing workflow to duplicate yet.
computation.newError: Launch failed — check the run ID is unique and try again.
computation.newHubbardHint: Override U per manifold for this run — e.g. to sweep U for DFT+U calibration.
computation.compareDescription: Overlay band gaps across runs — e.g. a Hubbard U sweep for DFT+U calibration.
computation.compareNoData: No selected run has a band gap yet.
computation.overlayNoBands: No selected run has band-structure data.
computation.overlayFailed: Could not load band structures for the selected runs.
computation.newImportHint: Paste a workflow definition with structure, global and a non-empty units array.
computation.newImportInvalid: Invalid workflow JSON — needs structure, global and a non-empty units array.
computation.composeDescription: Build a DFT pipeline from an archetype, tune each node, and launch — with a live workflow-JSON preview.
computation.composeSourceHint: Inherit cell, species, cutoffs, functional and Hubbard U from an existing run; the pipeline below is composed fresh.
computation.composeNoRuns: No existing run to inherit a structure from — import a definition first.
computation.composeError: Could not load that run's structure.
computation.composePhononNote: Phonon (ph.x) is not available yet — needs worker support.
computation.composeSelectNode: Select a node to edit its parameters.
computation.composeRunIdHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens; 3–64 characters.
computation.composeInputEmpty: Refresh to render this node's input.
computation.composeInputError: Could not render input — check parameters.

structures.importDescription: Build a computation-ready cell from a Materials Project id, CIF, or POSCAR.
structures.mpIdHint: e.g. mp-1821 (2H-WS₂). Fetched with the workspace's configured MP key.
structures.empty: No structures yet — import one from Materials Project, CIF, or POSCAR.
structures.mpSearchPlaceholder: Formula, elements, or id — e.g. WO3, W-O, mp-1821
structures.mpSearchFailed: Search failed. Check the MP key on the worker and try again.
structures.mpModeOnlyHint: Materials containing only the selected elements.
structures.mpModeAtLeastHint: Materials containing at least the selected elements.
structures.sceneFailed: Could not build the 3D scene. The structure may need re-importing.
